// CLAUDE CODE TEAM SETTINGS: Edit this file to configure your dev team setup.

PreToolUse.// description: Block Claude from modifying protected files (.env, secrets, lock files)

PostToolUse.// description: Log every file edit to .claude/edit-log.txt for audit trail

permissions.// description: Commands Claude is never allowed to run, regardless of context
